title: momordica stefaninii
intro: Momordica stefaninii, also known as the Stefanin's bitter apple, is a plant species belonging to the Cucurbitaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Momordica stefaninii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, as well as its ability to promote digestion and boost the immune system. Momordica stefaninii is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, the seeds are crushed and used as a poultice for topical application.
